description: Generate a 2-sheet resident sprite candidate from a character portrait for future canonical ready promotion only. Do not use this recipe for current PO preview work while the 2-sheet generation path is unstable.

poPreviewReplacement.summary: Current PO preview work uses one resident at a time, Codex pet / hatch-pet visual evidence, one combined preview PNG when the two-sheet path drifts, sprite:fit, low-effort subagent review, and lead double-check.

technicalInputsMvp: slug - internal asset key. Manual CLI only; the game request writer derives this automatically.
agentRole: Codex sidekick - separate process from GodSandbox app. The non-technical user provides only the 5 character creation inputs. Internal IDs stay in the sidekick flow and are not player-facing fields.

steps.description: Verify the adopted motion-sheet baseline passes before proceeding.
steps.note: visual audit warnings (exit 0) are not failures

steps.description: Verify the adopted extended-sheet baseline passes before proceeding.
steps.note: visual audit warnings (exit 0) are not failures

steps.description: Auto-generate job JSON, set up folders, copy portrait reference, and generate both prompt files from _template.md and _template-extended.md if absent.
Codex agent uses hatch-pet / Codex pet to generate Sheet 1 (motion). GodSandbox app must not call image generation APIs directly.
prohibited: Do not copy or resize the portrait as a substitute sprite sheet
Do not create a local handmade or synthetic sprite sheet
Do not treat any non-Codex-pet-generated image as a candidate

steps.description: Codex agent uses hatch-pet / Codex pet to generate Sheet 2 (extended) with the same character identity as Sheet 1.
prohibited: Do not copy or resize the portrait as a substitute sprite sheet
Do not create a local handmade or synthetic sprite sheet
Do not treat any non-Codex-pet-generated image as a candidate

steps.description: Run the full validation suite. slug mode requires both motion and extended sheets.
nonBlockers: visual audit warnings (exit code 0, heuristic hints only)

steps.description: Human reviewer inspects both contact sheets and confirms character identity.
PO confirms sandbox display fit for the 2-sheet pair. Required before ready promotion.

forbidden: Do not promote either sheet before PO visual confirmation
Do not treat single-sheet pass as ready
